flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Mobile fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Mobile rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (35.8% → 42.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Mobile rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 1.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Mobile rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (64.3% → 74.0%).
